'''Ratambo Gale''' was a member of the [[Malkite Poisoners]], which were adept assassins on the world of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]].

==Biography==
A skilled poisoner for more than four [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]], Ratambo had never been caught, but some of his poisons were known to not have worked.

He was hired by an unknown force to harass the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Hanna City/Legends|Hanna City]], [[Jovive Centi]]. [[Death/Legends|Killing]] her bodyguard [[Tristan Pex]], he implicated a group of offworlders in the crime.

{{Char-stub}}
